                if = { limit = { has_building = sanchi_stupa_01 } remove_building = sanchi_stupa_01 }

        }
    }
}

DI_max_building_upgrades_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = abamath_01 NOT = { has_building = abamath_01 } } add_building = abamath_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = abbey_bazaar_of_zenithar_01 NOT = { has_building = abbey_bazaar_of_zenithar_01 } } add_building = abbey_bazaar_of_zenithar_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = academy_01 NOT = { has_building = academy_04 } } add_building = academy_04 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = academybard_01 NOT = { has_building = academybard_08 } } add_building = academybard_08 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = academydip_01 NOT = { has_building = academydip_08 } } add_building = academydip_08 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = academymag_01 NOT = { has_building = academymag_08 } } add_building = academymag_08 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = academyscho_01 NOT = { has_building = academyscho_08 } } add_building = academyscho_08 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = academywar_01 NOT = { has_building = academywar_08 } } add_building = academywar_08 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = adamantine_tower_01 NOT = { has_building = adamantine_tower_01 } } add_building = adamantine_tower_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = adamantium_mine_01 NOT = { has_building = adamantium_mine_04 } } add_building = adamantium_mine_04 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = al_qarawiyyin_university_01 NOT = { has_building = al_qarawiyyin_university_01 } } add_building = al_qarawiyyin_university_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = alabaster_white_walls_01 NOT = { has_building = alabaster_white_walls_01 } } add_building = alabaster_white_walls_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = ald_mirathi_01 NOT = { has_building = ald_mirathi_01 } } add_building = ald_mirathi_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = alinor_city_01 NOT = { has_building = alinor_city_01 } } add_building = alinor_city_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = alinor_harbor_01 NOT = { has_building = alinor_harbor_01 } } add_building = alinor_harbor_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = alinor_palace_01 NOT = { has_building = alinor_palace_01 } } add_building = alinor_palace_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = alinor_royal_capital_01 NOT = { has_building = alinor_royal_capital_01 } } add_building = alinor_royal_capital_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = almalexia_temple_01 NOT = { has_building = almalexia_temple_01 } } add_building = almalexia_temple_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = almas_thir_01 NOT = { has_building = almas_thir_01 } } add_building = almas_thir_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = amaya_vineyard_01 NOT = { has_building = amaya_vineyard_02 } } add_building = amaya_vineyard_02 }

                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = anvil_harborside_01 NOT = { has_building = anvil_harborside_01 } } add_building = anvil_harborside_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = arcane_university_01 NOT = { has_building = arcane_university_01 } } add_building = arcane_university_01 }

                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = burg_tusktrutz_01 NOT = { has_building = burg_tusktrutz_01 } } add_building = burg_tusktrutz_01 }

                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = camel_farms_01 NOT = { has_building = camel_farms_08 } } add_building = camel_farms_08 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = capital_bureau_01 NOT = { has_building = capital_bureau_08 } } add_building = capital_bureau_08 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = caravanserai_01 NOT = { has_building = caravanserai_08 } } add_building = caravanserai_08 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = castle_01 NOT = { has_building = castle_04 } } add_building = castle_04 }

                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = volkihar_castle_01 NOT = { has_building = volkihar_castle_01 } } add_building = volkihar_castle_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = walls_00 NOT = { has_building = walls_04 } } add_building = walls_04 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = walls_01_city NOT = { has_building = walls_01_city } } add_building = walls_01_city }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = walls_01_tribal NOT = { has_building = walls_01_tribal } } add_building = walls_01_tribal }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = walls_02_city NOT = { has_building = walls_02_city } } add_building = walls_02_city }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = walls_03_city NOT = { has_building = walls_03_city } } add_building = walls_03_city }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = walls_04_city NOT = { has_building = walls_04_city } } add_building = walls_04_city }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = wantilan_01 NOT = { has_building = wantilan_04 } } add_building = wantilan_04 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = war_camps_01 NOT = { has_building = war_camps_02 } } add_building = war_camps_02 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = warrior_lodges_01 NOT = { has_building = warrior_lodges_08 } } add_building = warrior_lodges_08 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = wartburg_01 NOT = { has_building = wartburg_01 } } add_building = wartburg_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = watchtowers_01 NOT = { has_building = watchtowers_08 } } add_building = watchtowers_08 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = water_temples_01 NOT = { has_building = water_temples_04 } } add_building = water_temples_04 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = watermills_01 NOT = { has_building = watermills_08 } } add_building = watermills_08 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = waterworks_01 NOT = { has_building = waterworks_08 } } add_building = waterworks_08 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = wawel_cathedral_01 NOT = { has_building = wawel_cathedral_03 } } add_building = wawel_cathedral_03 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = weatherleah_hunting_lodge_01 NOT = { has_building = weatherleah_hunting_lodge_01 } } add_building = weatherleah_hunting_lodge_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = white_gold_tower_01 NOT = { has_building = white_gold_tower_01 } } add_building = white_gold_tower_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = wilderkings_throne_01 NOT = { has_building = wilderkings_throne_01 } } add_building = wilderkings_throne_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = wilwatikta_palace_01 NOT = { has_building = wilwatikta_palace_01 } } add_building = wilwatikta_palace_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = wind_furnace_01 NOT = { has_building = wind_furnace_08 } } add_building = wind_furnace_08 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = windmills_01 NOT = { has_building = windmills_08 } } add_building = windmills_08 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = winterhold_college_01 NOT = { has_building = winterhold_college_01 } } add_building = winterhold_college_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = winterhold_fortress_01 NOT = { has_building = winterhold_fortress_01 } } add_building = winterhold_fortress_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = woodheart_sewers_01 NOT = { has_building = woodheart_sewers_02 } } add_building = woodheart_sewers_02 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = workshops_01 NOT = { has_building = workshops_08 } } add_building = workshops_08 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = xaria_tears_01 NOT = { has_building = xaria_tears_01 } } add_building = xaria_tears_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = xi_tsei_01 NOT = { has_building = xi_tsei_01 } } add_building = xi_tsei_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = yazd_mosque_01 NOT = { has_building = yazd_mosque_01 } } add_building = yazd_mosque_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = york_walls_01 NOT = { has_building = york_walls_01 } } add_building = york_walls_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = yuelu_academy_01 NOT = { has_building = yuelu_academy_01 } } add_building = yuelu_academy_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = zazaradi_mines_01 NOT = { has_building = zazaradi_mines_04 } } add_building = zazaradi_mines_04 }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_construct_building_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    saved_scopes = {
        building_type # Flag of Building Type to construct
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            scope:building_type = flag:castle_01
                            scope:building_type = flag:castle_02
                            scope:building_type = flag:castle_03
                            scope:building_type = flag:castle_04
                        }
                        NOT = { has_building_or_higher = castle_01 }
                    }
                    set_holding_type = castle_holding
                }

                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            scope:building_type = flag:city_01
                            scope:building_type = flag:city_02
                            scope:building_type = flag:city_03
                            scope:building_type = flag:city_04
                            scope:building_type = flag:city
                        }
                        NOT = { has_building_or_higher = city_01 }
                    }
                    set_holding_type = city_holding
                }

                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            scope:building_type = flag:temple_01
                            scope:building_type = flag:temple_02
                            scope:building_type = flag:temple_03
                            scope:building_type = flag:temple_04
                        }
                        NOT = { has_building_or_higher = temple_01 }
                    }
                    set_holding_type = church_holding
                }

                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            scope:building_type = flag:tribe_01
                            scope:building_type = flag:tribe_02
                            scope:building_type = flag:tribe_03
                            scope:building_type = flag:tribe_04
                        }
                        NOT = { has_building_or_higher = tribe_01 }
                    }
                    set_holding_type = tribal_holding
                }

                switch = {
                    trigger = scope:building_type
                    flag:capital_bureau_01 = { add_building = capital_bureau_01 }
                    flag:capital_bureau_02 = { add_building = capital_bureau_02 }
                    flag:capital_bureau_03 = { add_building = capital_bureau_03 }
                    flag:capital_bureau_04 = { add_building = capital_bureau_04 }
                    flag:capital_bureau_05 = { add_building = capital_bureau_05 }
                    flag:capital_bureau_06 = { add_building = capital_bureau_06 }
                    flag:capital_bureau_07 = { add_building = capital_bureau_07 }
                    flag:capital_bureau_08 = { add_building = capital_bureau_08 }
                    flag:castle_01 = { add_building = castle_01 }
                    flag:castle_02 = { add_building = castle_02 }
                    flag:castle_03 = { add_building = castle_03 }
                    flag:castle_04 = { add_building = castle_04 }
                    flag:city_01 = { add_building = city_01 }
                    flag:city_02 = { add_building = city_02 }
                    flag:city_03 = { add_building = city_03 }
                    flag:city_04 = { add_building = city_04 }
                    flag:city = { add_building = city }
                    flag:guild_halls_01 = { add_building = guild_halls_01 }
                    flag:guild_halls_02 = { add_building = guild_halls_02 }
                    flag:guild_halls_03 = { add_building = guild_halls_03 }
                    flag:guild_halls_04 = { add_building = guild_halls_04 }
                    flag:guild_halls_05 = { add_building = guild_halls_05 }
                    flag:guild_halls_06 = { add_building = guild_halls_06 }
                    flag:guild_halls_07 = { add_building = guild_halls_07 }
                    flag:guild_halls_08 = { add_building = guild_halls_08 }
                    flag:hospices_01 = { add_building = hospices_01 }
                    flag:hospices_02 = { add_building = hospices_02 }
                    flag:hospices_03 = { add_building = hospices_03 }
                    flag:hospices_04 = { add_building = hospices_04 }
                    flag:hospices_05 = { add_building = hospices_05 }
                    flag:hospices_06 = { add_building = hospices_06 }
                    flag:hospices_07 = { add_building = hospices_07 }
                    flag:hospices_08 = { add_building = hospices_08 }
                    flag:dragon_kiln_01 = { add_building = dragon_kiln_01 }
                    flag:dragon_kiln_02 = { add_building = dragon_kiln_02 }
                    flag:dragon_kiln_03 = { add_building = dragon_kiln_03 }
                    flag:examination_hall_01 = { add_building = examination_hall_01 }
                    flag:examination_hall_02 = { add_building = examination_hall_02 }
                    flag:examination_hall_03 = { add_building = examination_hall_03 }
                    flag:tower_of_silence_01 = { add_building = tower_of_silence_01 }
                    flag:charnel_grounds_01 = { add_building = charnel_grounds_01 }
                    flag:charnel_grounds_02 = { add_building = charnel_grounds_02 }
                    flag:charnel_grounds_03 = { add_building = charnel_grounds_03 }
                    flag:burial_site_01 = { add_building = burial_site_01 }
                    flag:burial_site_02 = { add_building = burial_site_02 }

DI_destroy_building_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    saved_scopes = {
        building_type # Flag of Building Base to destroy
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                switch = {
                    trigger = scope:building_type
                    flag:abamath = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = abamath_01 } remove_building = abamath_01 }
                    }
                    flag:abbey_bazaar_of_zenithar = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = abbey_bazaar_of_zenithar_01 } remove_building = abbey_bazaar_of_zenithar_01 }
                    }
                    flag:academy = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = academy_04 } remove_building = academy_04 }
                        else_if = { limit = { has_building = academy_03 } remove_building = academy_03 }
                        else_if = { limit = { has_building = academy_02 } remove_building = academy_02 }
                        else_if = { limit = { has_building = academy_01 } remove_building = academy_01 }
                    }
                    flag:academybard = {
                        DI_remove_building_type_effect = { BUILDING = academybard }
                    }
                    flag:academydip = {
                        DI_remove_building_type_effect = { BUILDING = academydip }
                    }
                    flag:academymag = {
                        DI_remove_building_type_effect = { BUILDING = academymag }
                    }
                    flag:academyscho = {
                        DI_remove_building_type_effect = { BUILDING = academyscho }
                    }
                    flag:academywar = {
                        DI_remove_building_type_effect = { BUILDING = academywar }
                    }
                    flag:adamantine_tower = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = adamantine_tower_01 } remove_building = adamantine_tower_01 }
                    }
                    flag:adamantium_mine = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = adamantium_mine_04 } remove_building = adamantium_mine_04 }
                        else_if = { limit = { has_building = adamantium_mine_03 } remove_building = adamantium_mine_03 }
                        else_if = { limit = { has_building = adamantium_mine_02 } remove_building = adamantium_mine_02 }
                        else_if = { limit = { has_building = adamantium_mine_01 } remove_building = adamantium_mine_01 }
                    }
                    flag:al_qarawiyyin_university = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = al_qarawiyyin_university_01 } remove_building = al_qarawiyyin_university_01 }
                    }
                    flag:alabaster_white_walls = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = alabaster_white_walls_01 } remove_building = alabaster_white_walls_01 }
                    }
                    flag:ald_mirathi = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = ald_mirathi_01 } remove_building = ald_mirathi_01 }
                    }
                    flag:alinor_city = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = alinor_city_01 } remove_building = alinor_city_01 }
                    }
                    flag:alinor_harbor = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = alinor_harbor_01 } remove_building = alinor_harbor_01 }
                    }
                    flag:alinor_palace = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = alinor_palace_01 } remove_building = alinor_palace_01 }
                    }
                    flag:alinor_royal_capital = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = alinor_royal_capital_01 } remove_building = alinor_royal_capital_01 }
                    }
                    flag:almalexia_temple = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = almalexia_temple_01 } remove_building = almalexia_temple_01 }
                    }
                    flag:almas_thir = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = almas_thir_01 } remove_building = almas_thir_01 }
                    }
                    flag:amaya_vineyard = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = amaya_vineyard_02 } remove_building = amaya_vineyard_02 }
                        else_if = { limit = { has_building = amaya_vineyard_01 } remove_building = amaya_vineyard_01 }
                    }
                    flag:amenos_station = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = amenos_station_01 } remove_building = amenos_station_01 }
                    }
                    flag:anequina_moon_gate = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = anequina_moon_gate_01 } remove_building = anequina_moon_gate_01 }
                    }
                    flag:ansu_gurleht_temple = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = ansu_gurleht_temple_01 } remove_building = ansu_gurleht_temple_01 }
                    }
                    flag:anvil_harborside = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = anvil_harborside_01 } remove_building = anvil_harborside_01 }
                    }
                    flag:arcane_university = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = arcane_university_01 } remove_building = arcane_university_01 }
                    }
                    flag:archery_ranges = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = archery_ranges_03 } remove_building = archery_ranges_03 }
                        else_if = { limit = { has_building = archery_ranges_02 } remove_building = archery_ranges_02 }
                        else_if = { limit = { has_building = archery_ranges_01 } remove_building = archery_ranges_01 }
                    }
                    flag:archon_harbor_district = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = archon_harbor_district_01 } remove_building = archon_harbor_district_01 }
                    }
                    flag:arena = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = arena_03 } remove_building = arena_03 }
                        else_if = { limit = { has_building = arena_02 } remove_building = arena_02 }
                        else_if = { limit = { has_building = arena_01 } remove_building = arena_01 }
                    }
                    flag:arenthia_citadel = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = arenthia_citadel_01 } remove_building = arenthia_citadel_01 }
                    }
                    flag:artemon_river_channels = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = artemon_river_channels_01 } remove_building = artemon_river_channels_01 }
                    }
                    flag:bal_tereg_stone_fortress = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = bal_tereg_stone_fortress_01 } remove_building = bal_tereg_stone_fortress_01 }
                    }
                    flag:bangkorai_garrison = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = bangkorai_garrison_01 } remove_building = bangkorai_garrison_01 }
                    }
                    flag:banished_cells = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = banished_cells_01 } remove_building = banished_cells_01 }
                    }
                    flag:barracks = {
                        DI_remove_building_type_effect = { BUILDING = barracks }
                    }
                    flag:battle_mage_arcaneum = {
                        DI_remove_building_type_effect = { BUILDING = battle_mage_arcaneum }
                    }
                    flag:beela_kars_laboratory = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = beela_kars_laboratory_01 } remove_building = beela_kars_laboratory_01 }
                    }
                    flag:beldama_wyrd_tree = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = beldama_wyrd_tree_01 } remove_building = beldama_wyrd_tree_01 }
                    }
                    flag:bendu_olo_statue = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = bendu_olo_statue_01 } remove_building = bendu_olo_statue_01 }
                    }
                    flag:beta_giyorgis = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = beta_giyorgis_01 } remove_building = beta_giyorgis_01 }
                    }
                    flag:blackpool_fort = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = blackpool_fort_02 } remove_building = blackpool_fort_02 }
                        else_if = { limit = { has_building = blackpool_fort_01 } remove_building = blackpool_fort_01 }
                    }
                    flag:blackrose_prison = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = blackrose_prison_01 } remove_building = blackrose_prison_01 }
                    }
                    flag:blacksmiths = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = blacksmiths_03 } remove_building = blacksmiths_03 }
                        else_if = { limit = { has_building = blacksmiths_02 } remove_building = blacksmiths_02 }
                        else_if = { limit = { has_building = blacksmiths_01 } remove_building = blacksmiths_01 }
                    }
                    flag:blue_palace = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = blue_palace_01 } remove_building = blue_palace_01 }
                    }
                    flag:bone_orchard = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = bone_orchard_02 } remove_building = bone_orchard_02 }
                        else_if = { limit = { has_building = bone_orchard_01 } remove_building = bone_orchard_01 }
                    }
                    flag:boudhanath = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = boudhanath_01 } remove_building = boudhanath_01 }
                    }
                    flag:breweries = {
                        DI_remove_building_type_effect = { BUILDING = breweries }
                    }
                    flag:bridges_leyawiin = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = bridges_leyawiin_02 } remove_building = bridges_leyawiin_02 }
                        else_if = { limit = { has_building = bridges_leyawiin_01 } remove_building = bridges_leyawiin_01 }
                    }
                    flag:buddha_kamakura = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = buddha_kamakura_01 } remove_building = buddha_kamakura_01 }
                    }
                    flag:burg_tusktrutz = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = burg_tusktrutz_01 } remove_building = burg_tusktrutz_01 }
                    }
                    flag:burial_site = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = burial_site_03 } remove_building = burial_site_03 }
                        else_if = { limit = { has_building = burial_site_02 } remove_building = burial_site_02 }
                        else_if = { limit = { has_building = burial_site_01 } remove_building = burial_site_01 }
                    }
                    flag:camel_farms = {
                        DI_remove_building_type_effect = { BUILDING = camel_farms }
                    }
                    flag:capital_bureau = {
                        DI_remove_building_type_effect = { BUILDING = capital_bureau }
                    }
                    flag:caravanserai = {
                        DI_remove_building_type_effect = { BUILDING = caravanserai }
                    }
                    flag:castle = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = castle_04 } remove_building = castle_04 }
                        else_if = { limit = { has_building = castle_03 } remove_building = castle_03 }
                        else_if = { limit = { has_building = castle_02 } remove_building = castle_02 }
                        else_if = { limit = { has_building = castle_01 } remove_building = castle_01 }
                    }
                    flag:castle_daggerfall = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = castle_daggerfall_01 } remove_building = castle_daggerfall_01 }
                    }
                    flag:castle_wayrest = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = castle_wayrest_01 } remove_building = castle_wayrest_01 }
                    }
                    flag:cath_bedraud = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = cath_bedraud_01 } remove_building = cath_bedraud_01 }
                    }
                    flag:cathedral_of_the_golden_path = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = cathedral_of_the_golden_path_02 } remove_building = cathedral_of_the_golden_path_02 }
                        else_if = { limit = { has_building = cathedral_of_the_golden_path_01 } remove_building = cathedral_of_the_golden_path_01 }
                    }
                    flag:celestial_great_barracks = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = celestial_great_barracks_01 } remove_building = celestial_great_barracks_01 }
                    }
                    flag:cereal_fields = {
                        DI_remove_building_type_effect = { BUILDING = cereal_fields }
                    }
                    flag:chapel_balyna = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = chapel_balyna_01 } remove_building = chapel_balyna_01 }
                    }
                    flag:chapel_of_the_eight = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = chapel_of_the_eight_01 } remove_building = chapel_of_the_eight_01 }
                    }
                    flag:charnel_grounds = {
